label_verbatim: FIRST: The name of the corporation is:
rationale: Legal name of the foreign nonprofit in its home jurisdiction. Foreign-filing convention per 2026-04-30-entity-name-vs-home-jurisdiction.md (matches MLLC-12, FICT-4).

label_verbatim: SECOND: ...the fictitious name under which it proposes to apply for authority to carry on activities in the State of Maine is:
rationale: Fictitious name used in Maine when home name is unavailable per 13-B MRSA §301-A. Matches MLLC-12 SECOND.
Boolean indicating Form FICT-4 (fictitious name registration) is bundled. Matches MLLC-12 Check Box4.

label_verbatim: THIRD: Its jurisdiction of incorporation is
rationale: State or country where the foreign nonprofit was incorporated. Matches MLLC-12 Text6.

label_verbatim: THIRD: ...and the date of incorporation is
rationale: Date the nonprofit was originally formed in its home jurisdiction. Matches MLLC-12 Text5.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: Purpose(s) it is authorized to do under the laws of its jurisdiction of incorporation: (inline blank)
rationale: First line of the home-jurisdiction-authorized purposes blank. Two-widget free-text follows the MARK1 .line{1,2} convention for multi-line single-concept fields.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: ...continuation line below the purpose statement
rationale: Second (continuation) line of the FOURTH purposes free-text.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: Does it seek authority to engage in all activities authorized in its jurisdiction and allowed by Maine Law? Yes
rationale: Mutually-exclusive radio option 'Yes' (true) for full-scope authority.
Mutually-exclusive radio option 'No' (false). When false, entity.maine_limited_activities must be filled.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: If no, specify activity (activities) for which authority is sought. (inline blank)
rationale: First line of the limited-activities free-text (only filled when filing.seeks_full_authority is false).
Second (continuation) line of the FIFTH limited-activities free-text.
Mutually-exclusive radio: enum value 'commercial'. Pairs with Text9 (CRA Public Number) and Text10 (CRA name).
Maine SOS CRA Public Number; required only when registered_agent.type='commercial'.
Mutually-exclusive radio: enum value 'noncommercial'. Pairs with Text11 (NCRA name).

label_verbatim: SIXTH: (physical location, not P.O. Box – street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Maine physical address of the registered agent. Single-line widget (no street/city/state/zip split).

label_verbatim: SIXTH: (mailing address if different from above)
rationale: Optional mailing address of the registered agent if different from physical location.
